basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Calicut has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech (Chemical Engineering) with minimum 60% marks or 6.5CGPA in aggregate from a recognized technical Institute or University, as a full time program with GATE qualified. Or Candidates Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering or any other relevant branch of Engineering and Technology from a recognised university with first class CGPA of 7.5 (on a 10-point scale) and a valid GATE score. Desirable: Experience in process modelling and simulation, and Aspen Plus and COMSOL simulation software.
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech (Chemical Engineering) with minimum 60% marks or 6.5CGPA in aggregate from a recognized technical Institute or University, as a full time program with GATE qualified. Or Candidates Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering or any other relevant branch of Engineering and Technology from a recognised university with first class CGPA of 7.5 (on a 10-point scale) and a valid GATE score. Desirable: Experience in process modelling and simulation, and Aspen Plus and COMSOL simulation software.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.E./M.Tech in Chemical Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA, or a Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering with first-class CGPA of 7.5 and a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job position.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.
